Subj: Why did Fox News clear their schedule to put this doctor on TV?

At an age when most of his friends are suffering from joint pain, diabetes and heart problems, Dr. Lane Sebring seems to be g​etting younger each day.

Despite turning 61 in March, Sebring is still competing in martial arts competitions against guys half his age... and winning!

But it's not just his physical prowess that's remarkable...

Take one glance at his lab tests, and you'd think you were looking at a guy in his 30's!

His blood pressure registers at a healthy 110/79, and his fasting blood sugar level never jumps above 70 mg/dL.

So when word of this age-defying M.D. got out, Fox News immediately cleared their schedule and rushed to get him on TV...

"How does a guy who's 61 years old, still enjoy life like a 30 year old?" t​hey wondered.

Sebring revealed to Fox News that he's a big believer in the popular paleo lifestyle.

But that's only part of his secret...

After a little prodding, Dr. Sebring also revealed that he has a "secret weapon" that he added to his regimen this year that's helping him f​eel younger ​by the day...

In fact, it's a super-drink that he originally developed to help older guys in the Coast Guard so they could keep up with the young guys in their unit.

Many of the older Coast Guardsman now swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.

Now, up until a few months ago this super-drink was only available to elite military units. Regular people like you and I could not purchase it.

However, after seeing the incredible results that the military was getting with Patriot Power Greens, Dr. Sebring realized that in good conscience he could no longer keep this drink from the public.

So for a limited time, Dr. Sebring has set aside a small number of FREE samples of Patriot Power Greens specifically for our readers.

You can read more about the drink, and claim a few samples for yourself right here.

Because this product is used by the U.S. Military, the military always gets "first dibs" when new inventory is available.

This makes it nearly impossible for the general public to get their hands on it.

But as a special "New Years" promo, Dr. Sebring is letting you try 7 sample packs of Patriot Power Greens for FREE.

All he asks is that you chip in a few bucks to help cover the shipping. I think that's a fair deal if you ask me.

These free samples are in high demand, so the free samples are limited to the first 200 people that claim them.

You can get all the details, and claim your FREE samples of Patriot Power Greens r​ight here.​

- Jeff Reagan

Editor, Patriot Health Alliance

P.S. ­- Dr. Sebring is’t the only one looking & feeling younger with Patriot Power Greens...

In fact, 23,497 seniors now swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.

What do they know that you don't?

I'll show you their secret right here

Emotional Story



Doctors consider you diabetic if your Hemoglobin A1C is over 6.4.



Tom Shrows was an 8.4.



He was on 4 different kinds of medication...



Suffered from acid reflux, gouty arthritis, obstructive sleep apnea, allergies, carpal tunnel…



And he weighed 309lbs.



Tom knew something needed to change.



But according to his doctor, his diabetes wasn't something he could fix.



It was something he'd have to live with. And do his best to "manage it" over time.



That killed Tom.



Because Tom hated what diabetes had done to his life.



That he had to constantly turn down food every time he'd go to a party.



That he would constantly feel tired, heavy and bloated.



That every person around him would try to give him advice on HIS disease.



Telling him he just needed to "stop eating sugar" and "get some more exercise so he could lose that weight!"



It drove him nuts!



Which was why even though his doctor told him it was a waste of time…



He didn't stop looking for something that would help him.



Eventually…



Tom stumbled on something called "the Primal diet" (aka, paleo)...



Where you only eat the things humans could have had thousands of years ago.



Tom didn't expect a whole lot.



But once he changed his eating…



It was like a switch had been flipped.



He says…



"Type II Diabetes was gone within a month. After 4 months my A1C is now at 5.1.



I also eliminated acid reflux, gouty arthritis, obstructive sleep apnea, seasonal allergies, plantar fasciitis, carpal tunnel, nerve cluster on knee, skin tags, and mood issues.



I used to get sick three to four times per year, But I have not been sick since going Primal.



And I'm down to zero prescription medications too."



Can you believe that?



His health completely FLIPPED.



JUST by changing the way he ate.



So if you suffer from diabetes like Tom did…



You'll want to see the amazing discovery made by researchers at the "Harvard" of the UK…



Who were able to REVERSE diabetes in 25 out of 26 cases...



Without drugs…



Or injections…



100% naturally.



At the cost of pennies a week!



Dr. Ron Taylor of Newcastle University will share how burning 1 lb of fat from a specific part of your body can help "flip the switch" to REVERSE diabetes AND reshape your body...



>> 1 simple trick to REVERSE your diabetes, naturally (helps to get rid of abdominal fat too)



Talk soon,

Dave

































Emotional Story



Dear Justin,

It can be difficult to feel the joy of the holiday season when your mind is filled with worry.

Last Christmas, celebrating was the last thing on Ava's mind.

You see, Ava was raised by her grandmother because her father was not involved in her life and her mother passed away when she was very young. She and her grandmother love each other dearly.

About a year ago, Ava's grandmother became so ill that she was afraid she would die. Her grandmother was the only other person in her life - what would she do if she were suddenly gone?

This is Ava's first Christmas at Mercy Home. Her grandmother is doing better today, but Ava still associates Christmas with anxiety and worry.

I'm reaching out to you today, Justin, because I'm hoping you can help me change Ava's mind about Christmas.



In addition to making sure that she has presents under the tree and a warm meal to enjoy, your generosity will show her that she is loved and supported by our entire Mercy Home family.

And, this is the perfect time to help kids like Ava. Every gift you give will make twice the difference in the lives of all our kids, thanks to a generous match from our friends at the Foglia Family Foundation. Every gift made in December will be matched up to $100,000!

 

GIVE A CHRISTMAS GIFT TODAY

 

I want to help Ava make new Christmas memories that are filled with the joy of the season, but I can't do that without your help.

Please give a gift that will ensure that kids like Ava have the Christmas every child deserves. No matter what amount you are able to give, it will go a long way to giving all of our kids a happy holiday.

I am truly thankful for your friendship to our children. Justin,on behalf of all of us at Mercy Home, have a very blessed Christmas.

Blessings,





Fr. Scott Donahue

President/CEO

But new evidence shows our ancestors used to eat a diet rich in natural inflammation-fighting foods…

 

Foods that Harvard researchers say protect your body from the root cause of arthritis & inflammation… and can even reverse any damage your arthritis has already done.
